title: China's AI April Revolution: Humanoid Robots Race, Multimodal Models Explode, and 2 Billion AI Videos Reshape Global Content
excerpt: April 2025 marks a watershed moment for China's AI industry. From the world's first humanoid robot half-marathon to DeepSeek's rumored V4 launch and ByteDance's Doubao 2.0 release, Chinese AI is accelerating on all fronts. AI-generated video content surged 14x to 20 billion clips, while embodied intelligence moves from lab to real-world endurance tests.
